review_title: Lots of useful, handy tools for youtube marketing
author: Hossamudin H.
pros: Having lots of really important features in one place. Being able to backup my channel is super good, and very important in the same time. Also, the A/B testing for thumbnail is an absolute must for big channels like mine.
cons: Well, although the pricing is really good, I think putting some essential tools in only the most expensive plan is a limitation. I hope they provide a customizable plan, like what features I need, and a pricing is set accordingly.

review_title: Tubebuddy review
author: Ful E.
pros: It help me to choose video topics and tags
cons: It is very difficult to use to a certain extent

review_title: Not as good as it used to be
description: I like the program, but I question its value for me now that the main draw for this program, mainly the templates for end screens and info cards, is nonfunctional, and it appears it won't be back anytime soon. They haven't done anything to compensate the users for this sudden lack in functionality, so I question whether I really need to keep paying this high monthly feel for something that isn't doing what I originally purchased it to do.
author: Ariel G.
pros: I like a lot of the functions of this program, but my main reason for being attracted to it was the ability to bulk edit and use templates for info cards and end screens. This definitely saved a lot of time and made it worth the price
cons: They are having problems with the info card and end screen templates that has been going on for over a month now, and it doesn't look like they are going to do much to fix it.

review_title: TubeBuddy Took My Video From 20,000 views to over 5 MILLION in Half The Time!
description: It's one of my go-to tools to make sure my videos get ranked fast on YouTube. Before using TubeBuddy I was getting very few views and making very little ad revenue, since using it I now consistently rank on the first page of YouTube for my keywords and make a lot more ad revenue!
author: Amanda V.
pros: I love how intuitive it is and how easy it makes it to reorganize your tags for more views on YouTube. I also love that it can give you great insight into how competitive a term is and gives you alternatives to use as well.
cons: I would like it better if it gave me exact numbers instead of high/low ranking but other than that I love it!

review_title: Great for beginner Youtubers (like me!) Easy to Use
description: So far its great! I'm excited to see how TubeBuddy is going to help my channel grow over the next 6 months/1 year. Maybe I'll come back here and give you all an update :)
author: Alison W.
pros: I'm finding TubeBuddy a really useful tool to get me started on my YouTube channel - i'm learning a lot about 'Key Words' and how to use them in my videos.
cons: Although it is easy to use, i think they layout in the app could be improved.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: TubeBuddy review
description: Its helping me to understand what content performs and how to improve my videos. Its for sure a must have. You need it to rank and if you want to grow your YouTube channel .
author: Maza C.
pros: TubeBuddy made my Youtube experience so much easier. I love the keyword research tool and how it helped me with the right titles and tags. The Thumbnail and SEO score tracking is awesome super super helpful. Helps my channel get seen.
cons: Its a little overwhelming especially for a beginner. You have to get the paid version to get the best out of it.

review_title: The Overall Best YouTube SEO Tool
description: Tube Buddy was the perfect choice that I've ever made when I started my YouTube channel in 2019, and also it's the major reason I've been gaining new subscribers and views every week.
author: Ogochukwu O.
pros: The Google Chrome extension of Tube Buddy made it my #1 easy to use YouTube SEO tool. One can easily optimize his or her videos without having to login to the website itself. In addition, Tube Buddy suggest high ranking tags and keywords for every user, in order to gain an edge over their competitors, and finally, for me, their monthly plan is very much affordable.
cons: Honestly for me, since I began using Tube Buddy in 2019, I've never found anything to call my problem.

review_title: Best buddy to YouTube video creators
author: Arun Sarathy P.
pros: There are tons of tools within TubeBuddy that are so useful for creating and publishing videos on YouTube. To name a few: 1. What's trending feature inside the keyword explorer is a treasure mine to discover video ideas. 2. Channel backup to export a CSV file (Star plan) with a list of videos, URLs, comment count, like and dislike count, views count, and more. 3. Checklist to identify potential ways to improve the reach of videos to many people. 4. Publish to facebook, as a separate video (not just YouTube video URL). 5. SEO operations on video 6. Easily add and append tags from within TubeBuddy dashboard to existing videos based on SEO suggestions. and much more...
cons: The plans and their pricing vary based on when you purchase. I bought a good deal during the Memorial day holiday and wondered why I took so long to upgrade to a paid plan. It's worth it!

review_title: Make TubeBuddy Yourbuddy!
description: Once you have used TubeBuddy, its hard to continue using Youtube without it. The necessity for it becomes a mandatory item once you see how much value it can provide.
author: Cathy T.
pros: Seamless integration into your Youtube studio application.
cons: More additions to the Edit department would make it close to perfect.

review_title: Increase your YouTube Audience's reach with tube buddy
author: James L.
pros: Keyword Explorer SEO studio These tools help streamline my workflow. It makes things significantly easier to get work done quicker. Speaking with the staff on Discord and their website has helped me think about things beyond what the tools offer. So, while there are software tools, there is a human element that is gracious to help you along the way.
cons: I had issues with the initial installation. It didn't want to play well with Safari. However, when I utilize it on Firefox and Chrome both work flawlessly.

review_title: YouTube tools that actually help
author: Kyshira S.
pros: Good for growing a channel, titles, tags, finding ideas, that kind of thing. Saves time with quick tools, stats are helpful.
cons: Interface feels old, some tools don’t always load right. A lot of features behind the paywall, kinda annoying in the free plan.

review_title: Every YouTube Needs A Buddy! 😉
description: There is lots of software out there. Some I've even reviewed. The difference with tube buddy isn't only it's quality. but it's an in-depth integrated system, that simultaneously collects and anticipates your data. It's pretty awesome and great for all enthusiasts and newbies.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Now I know what you're thinking. Why tube buddy? What does it do for me? Well. As a creator or someone who wants to be a content creator or even some random person who decided to put a video or two, this software is extremely useful when it comes to everything technical you don't really want to or know how to deal with. So let's list the facts. The first thing you need to know is that it's a browser extension. Meaning, it literally adds itself to your channel and seamlessly detects your data to give you maximum results. Want to rank higher in YouTube's search engine? Well, tube buddy's keyword explorer feature shows you what titles people are actively searching for. It gives you a competitive edge, especially if you're looking for a searchable title. Plan topics with video planner options, get a tag list best suited for your video, the best time to publish and click magnet, which basically helps you determine what your audience wants to see. Yes, I know that for some it's way too deep, but that's just the tip of your iceberg. it's simple concise, user-friendly and vital for both professional and amateur creators.
cons: There is nothing that can say negative about tube buddy, I don't even mind the pricing. It's worth the money.

review_title: The best SEO tool for YouTube
description: TubeBuddy will not do a miracle. But if you’re doing quality work, it can help you increase your channel’s reach. As content creators, we need to help YouTube's algorithm understand our content and recommend our videos. And that is what the tool will help. It will be useful for you to find ranking opportunities in the YouTube search. It also helps to choose good thumbnails based on the competition. In addition to the extra features, which help a lot, from copyright-free music for videos to templates to create final screens on videos in a professional way. From a small channel to a channel that already has many subscribers, using TubeBuddy will enhance your results.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I was surprised by each feature that the tool provides. For example, just with the search trend tab, I was able to publish the best video on my channel (it remains the most watched). Also the extra features are excellent, I use the songs that are included in the TubeBuddy partner and my videos are much more interesting. Also, keyword research based on my channel is an excellent resource, which I use a lot and after hiring this tool my results have increased a lot.
cons: The only difficulty I had was getting used to all the features of the tool. But I used the videos from the TubeBuddy channel on YouTube to learn how to use the tool. Always learning and practicing, and today I can do SEO on my videos without much difficulty.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: A must-have tool for anyone creating content for YouTube
author: Yann I.
pros: TubeBuddy is by far the best tool I have found out about and use to make the most out of YouTube and the video content I publish on the platform. Of all the different things included in the TubeBuddy toolkit (and there are many!), my favorite ones have to do with video SEO. In particular, I really like SEO Studio, Search Positions/Rankings, Keyword Explorer and Search Explorer. Thanks to these features, I'm able to see what people are search for on YouTube, optimize my video content accordingly, and see what I can do to make my content rank higher. If you produce videos, then you want to have as many eyeballs on it as possible...and TubeBuddy let's you make the most out of the #1 video platform and 2nd largest search engine in the world!
cons: The one thing I'm not a fan of is the fact that, despite having a Pro TubeBuddy account, I still don't get access to any of the bulk processing features. Sure, this is a decision the company made, but I think that one of the things a video creator wants to be able to do is to better streamline his/her overall video production workflow – and being able to take care of several things in bulk would be really useful... but this doesn't happen unless you use a certain membership plan.

review_title: Great tool, couldn't imagine YouTube channel management at scale without it
description: Automation of time-consuming jobs with an easy to use interface and plugin via chrome extension. Backend manager portal could be better, particularly for managing high volumes of channels rather than 1 or 2 individual ones.
author: Ed C.
pros: Number of features that are clearly designed by someone that knows and as used YouTube. Is great for managing channels with high volumes of content and for performing take over overhauls.
cons: Licensing can be tricky with multiple users and channels with channels becoming 'attached' to logins rather than products being applied globally. Unsure if this is addressed with top tier access but is not with 'star' level. Support was extremely helpful in assisting with setup.

review_title: A must as a YouTube content creator
description: The TubeBuddy team is super awesome & very helpful. The community is great for discussion, support & everything.
author: Nathan G.
pros: Very versatile, lots of functionality & very helpful for improving your SEO in YouTube videos. You can even do some nice research on video tags & trending topics. Create thumbnails directly on YouTube & more. Both free & paid options.
cons: There are some features that it doesn't have, like flipping an image in the thumbnail creator & it would be kinda nice if some features weren't necessarily paid. But that's nitpicking, TubeBuddy is great!

review_title: Made my YouTube experience an ease
description: It has made having You Tube channels ,much easier and checking on them a snap.
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Having multiple You Tube channels can be difficult sometimes. With this app, you can check so many aspects from your channel right from the app. Also switching between channels is an ease.
cons: Some features are limited without paying. The payment monthly is not bad and they have specials sometimes so its worth it.

review_title: The tool you need to improve your YouTube SEO.
author: Verified Reviewer

The tool has given us the liberty to quickly choose and add keywords from its keyword suggestion box. Plus, these keywords can be further analyzed by seeing its traffic volume.
